mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, category_id, image, price, description, status, create_time, update_time,create_user,update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{image}, #{price}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update dish
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
image = #{image},
price = #{price},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
update_user = #{updateUser},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
